title: Founder Associate
source: Early & Exec newsletter (early-roles 16th February) -> Mayday careers page
industry: AI / Fintech (AI + automation tools for in-house finance teams)
requirements_met: Strong organizational skills: managed multiple workstreams and brought structure to early-stage chaos at Minima
Comfort with sales conversations: led GTM, positioning and a community-led presale ($4.5m, 15x ROI)
Relationship-building / partnerships: built ambassador programmes, investor introductions, PR agency relationships
Self-starter mentality: 6 years founder-facing at Minima from seed to Series A, took ownership across functions
gaps: Accounting or finance professional background: NOT held -- this is a core required skill given Mayday's finance-tools product (primary gap)
preferred_met: No separate preferred/nice-to-have section in listing

preferred_skills.calculation: No preferred section in listing -> award full 20 (no requirements to fail on)

experience_fit.calculation: Founder Associate role; Ryan was a Founder's Associate at Minima + ~8 yrs early-stage generalist experience -- exact/overqualified match

industry_match.calculation: Mayday builds automation and AI tools for finance teams (AI-native/AI-applying company, fintech) -- related to AI target industry

location_match.calculation: Central London hybrid (1-2 days in-person); Ryan open to London hybrid

salary_penalty.reason: Salary range GBP 50-80k overlaps/meets GBP 50k minimum

notes: Mayday builds automation and AI tools to eliminate manual spreadsheet accounting for in-house finance teams (mid-market SMBs); ~GBP 1m ARR, partners with Xero. Role spans demos/sales, internal finance, ops projects, partnerships, product insight. Core gap: role wants an accounting/finance background which Ryan does not have.

must_haves.req: First-hand experience of the problem: you've worked as an accountant or finance professional, fluent in debits and credits, genuinely enjoy accounting
must_haves.note: Ryan has fundraising/budget exposure but is NOT an accountant or finance professional; no accounting discipline background — this is the explicit lead must-have

must_haves.req: Highly organised and detail-oriented, juggle many moving parts
must_haves.note: Ran multiple workstreams as first employee

must_haves.req: Excited by sales and customer conversations
must_haves.note: Led GTM, community-led presale, demos to community

must_haves.req: Strong relationship builder across customers, partners, stakeholders
must_haves.note: Ambassador programmes, investor intros, PR-agency management

must_haves.req: Curious/enthusiastic about software products and finance-team transformation
must_haves.note: Strong product/AI curiosity but no finance-tooling domain

hard_blockers: Lead must-have is an accounting/finance-professional background ('fluent in debits and credits') — Ryan does not have it; Mayday explicitly wants a domain practitioner to sell to and build for finance teams
met_strengths: Founder-associate scope and sales/relationship/operations skills all match the secondary requirements
AI-applied fintech is an interesting domain fit on the surface
interview_match.one_line_verdict: Operationally a great FA match but gated by an explicit accountant/finance-practitioner requirement Ryan clearly fails — likely screened out at the domain question.
